# gelatops

> All-in-one management platform for artisan gelato and ice cream businesses — recipes, real-time food costs and margins, production planning, EU allergen labelling, stockpile tracking, online-order intake and sales analytics in one web app.

gelatops is built for artisan gelato makers, gelaterie, small ice-cream production labs and pastry kitchens. It centralises recipe management, real-time food costing at configurable batch sizes (e.g. 1 L / 5 L / 10 L / 15 L), EU 1169/2011 allergen tracking with sub-recipe inheritance, production planning with frozen-snapshot shopping lists, Stripe-webhook online-order intake, and sales-vs-cost analytics from a connected Zettle (PayPal) till. The product replaces the spreadsheets, Word documents, and phone calls that most gelaterias currently rely on.

## Key facts

- gelatops covers all 14 mandatory allergen categories under EU Regulation 1169/2011.
- Production plans freeze ingredient prices at submission, so margins are locked the moment you commit.
- gelatops integrates with any online shop that can fire a Stripe webhook — including Stripe Checkout, custom Stripe-based shops, and WooCommerce / Shopify when configured to emit webhook events.
- Pricing is pay-as-you-go: the first 10 production runs are free, with every feature and no payment details. After that, Studio is €49/month and Pro is €149/month — and you are billed only for the months you actually use gelatops (no usage in a 30-day period means no charge).
- Plan tiers: Starter (free up to 10 production runs, all features); Studio €49/mo (everything in Starter plus unlimited production runs, team accounts and roles, priority email support); Pro €149/mo (everything in Studio plus order-webhook integration, multiple shop integrations). Unlimited recipes are included on every plan.
- gelatops connects a Zettle (PayPal) till to chart daily revenue against the actual cost of each batch, and shows every recipe's gross margin and cheap / ideal / premium retail price tiers.
- Label generation, smart recipe balancing and supplier auto-ordering are on the roadmap (coming soon).
- The recipe system is ingredient-agnostic: gelato, sorbet, vegan, milk-based and fruit-based recipes all use the same tooling.
- Recipes can include sub-recipes; allergens declared on a sub-recipe automatically propagate to the parent.
- gelatops runs on AWS with encrypted connections, automated database backups, and private infrastructure.
- The product is web-only and runs in any modern browser; there is nothing to install.
- The interface is available in English, Italian and German.

## How it works (4 steps)

1. Set up your recipes — add gelato and sorbet recipes with per-litre ingredient amounts and ingredient prices.
2. Add what you need to produce — items enter the production queue manually, or land automatically via Stripe webhook from your online shop.
3. Build your production plan — assign queue items to dated production runs, adjust quantities, review the cost summary.
4. Submit and order — get a frozen shopping list with quantities and prices locked; print it, export to CSV, or tick items off as you buy. (Auto-sending the list to a connected supplier is coming soon.)
